queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and loan repayment behavior.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Investigation into the risk-mitigating effect of having no known savings account on credit default determinants and borrower stability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Analysis of the influence of minimal savings balances below 100 DM on credit risk drivers and reduced default probability.
